description.from: Set up Cursor MCP configuration so this workspace can launch the local Plexus MCP server and exercise execute_tactus as an actual Cursor MCP tool during real hardening runs.
description.to: Set up and debug Cursor MCP configuration so this workspace can launch the local Plexus MCP server and exercise execute_tactus as an actual Cursor MCP tool during real hardening runs. Current blocker: Cursor reports a cursor-app-control MCP JSON parse error after restart.
